title: K/2 Ian / K-ET
author: Ian Probert

steps_raw.instruction: To 994 ml of seawater (pH 8.2, adjusted with NaOH) add: %s %s * optional
To 950ml distilled H 2 O add: %s %s Make up to 1 litre with milliQ H 2 O, sterilize (filter 0.22µm) and store in fridge.
To 950ml distilled H 2 O add: %s %s Make up to 1 litre with milliQ H 2 O, sterilize (filter 0.22µm) and store in fridge.
To 950ml distilled H 2 O add %s %s Make up to 1 litre with milliQ H2O, filter sterilize into plastic vials and store in freezer.

Optional: Heat to 80°C for 2 hours and leave to cool – this should kill most organisms but should not chemically modify the medium too much Filter sterilize through 0.22µm filters (e.g. Millipore Steritop units) into sterile (autoclaved) polycarbonate bottles.
Add 10-30 ml marine soil extract (ET) as detailed in the protocol below Soil extract for algal media by Daniel Vaulot
